channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Did Brexit actually work?
item.description: A vote that changed Britain forever. Ten years after Brexit, the UK is still grappling with its consequences.

item.title: Iran’s president awarded honorary doctorate in Pakistan
item.description: Iran’s President Masoud Pezeshkian was awarded an honorary medical fellowship in cardiac surgery.

item.title: The children Gaza lost
item.description: What does a new UN report documenting the killing and suffering of Palestinian children in Gaza reveal?

item.title: Amid Israeli incursions, this mother demands the return of her son
item.description: Many Lebanese civilians have gone missing amid continuous Israeli incursions in the south.

item.title: ABC ‘fighting back’, urging US public to defend stations amid FCC scrutiny
item.description: Donald Trump has intensified criticism of ABC, alleging bias and threatening lawsuits over network's recent coverage.

item.title: Has the worst of the Hormuz crisis passed?
item.description: Ships are moving again through the Strait of Hormuz, with oil prices falling. But relief for consumers may take longer.

item.title: Greta Thunberg pleads not guilty in trespassing case over 2024 pro-Palestin
item.description: Greta Thunberg pleads not guilty in trespassing case over 2024 pro-Palestine protest

item.title: Israeli attacks kill 2 in southern Lebanon despite ongoing Washington talks
item.description: Israeli defence minister says troops won’t withdraw from southern Lebanon as attacks slow but do not stop.

item.title: Trump cancels housing bill signing, demands US voter ID law first
item.description: The affordable housing bill had been passed by bipartisan support, a rare move in a deeply divided US Congress.

item.title: What The Elephant Knows | Ep 7 – Sri Lanka
item.description: In rural Sri Lanka, families face deadly human-elephant conflict while seeking a fragile path to co-existence.

item.title: Israeli attacks on Gaza and occupied West Bank kill two, including child
item.description: Health officials at Nasser Medical Complex tell Al Jazeera a 12-year-old child was killed in al-Mawasi, Gaza.

item.title: How Colombia’s traditional midwives serve as lifelines to rural communities
item.description: Parts of Colombia are isolated, with no hospitals nearby. Experts say midwives can help bridge the healthcare gap.

item.title: Why Accra slavery reparatory justice meeting matters
item.description: From apology to action: the renewed push for slavery reparations amid questions over delivery.

item.title: Rubio says Iran cannot charge tolls in Hormuz: What we know
item.description: Tehran says the strait 'will never return' to its prewar conditions and claims it can charge fees for services.

item.title: Rubio tries to reassure Gulf allies on US-Iran deal details
item.description: Rubio tours Gulf in bid to allay allies' security concerns over the US-Iran memorandum of understanding.

item.title: When Paris is hotter than Mecca: How Europe’s heatwave compares globally
item.description: Paris and other European cities are seeing temperatures above 40C (104F), levels normally seen across the Middle East.

item.title: Deaths, disruptions across Europe: What you should know about the heatwave
item.description: Experts say the climate crisis is making Europe's heatwaves more frequent and more intense.

item.title: What does Pakistan stand to gain from helping broker the US-Iran deal?
item.description: Pakistan sees strategic opportunity in the US-Iran thaw, including trade, energy access and renewed regional relevance.

item.title: Iranians cautiously optimistic about thorny deal with US
item.description: Iran is watching closely as months of complex negotiations lie ahead amid internal political disputes.

item.title: World Cup 2026: Full group schedule and top third-round matches to watch
item.description: Remaining group schedule, teams, as well as the best third-round group fixtures at the tournament in North America.

item.title: Japan weighs deploying forces to demine the Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Japan is considering sending its navy to help clear mines in the Strait of Hormuz following the US-Iran ceasefire.

item.title: World Cup 2026: Messi, Mbappe, Haaland contest best ever Golden Boot race?
item.description: Lionel Messi leads the way with five goals with Kylian Mbappe and Erling Haaland second with four goals each.

item.title: Mamdani-backed candidates defeat pro-Israel lawmakers in primaries
item.description: Candidates backed by Zohran Mamdani have scored major wins in primaries, unseating Democrats backed by pro-Israel groups

item.title: US Senate approves Iran war powers resolution: What that means for Trump
item.description: Four Republicans cross party lines to vote in favour of the measure.

item.title: North Korea commissions warship as Kim eyes nuclear navy
item.description: Kim Jong Un vows to equip North Korea's navy with nuclear weapons, signaling a strategic shift in military capabilities.
